name: Magic Dye Solvent 1000ml Cyan Ink
description: Premium dye-based solvent ink with ultra-vibrant colors and wide gamut. Specially formulated for high-end graphic applications.

name: Magic Dye Solvent 1000ml Magenta Ink
description: Premium dye-based solvent ink with ultra-vibrant colors and wide gamut. Specially formulated for high-end graphic applications.

name: Magic Dye Solvent 1000ml Yellow Ink
description: Premium dye-based solvent ink with ultra-vibrant colors and wide gamut. Specially formulated for high-end graphic applications.

name: Magic Dye Solvent 1000ml Black Ink
description: Premium dye-based solvent ink with ultra-vibrant colors and wide gamut. Specially formulated for high-end graphic applications.

name: NUtec Ruby R10-RTR 1000ml Cyan UV Ink
description: Certified premium roll-to-roll UV ink from NUtec. Cures with LED and conventional UV lamps. High density color for flexible medias.

name: NUtec Ruby R10-RTR 1000ml Magenta UV Ink
description: Certified premium roll-to-roll UV ink from NUtec. Cures with LED and conventional UV lamps. High density color for flexible medias.

name: NUtec Ruby R10-RTR 1000ml Yellow UV Ink
description: Certified premium roll-to-roll UV ink from NUtec. Cures with LED and conventional UV lamps. High density color for flexible medias.

name: NUtec Ruby R10-RTR 1000ml Black UV Ink
description: Certified premium roll-to-roll UV ink from NUtec. Cures with LED and conventional UV lamps. High density color for flexible medias.

name: NUtec Ruby R10-RTR 1000ml White UV Ink
description: High-opacity white UV ink from NUtec. Perfect for base layers on transparent or dark substrates.

name: Roland VersaSTUDIO BN2-20A Desktop Printer Cutter
description: Professional print quality and legendary Roland DG reliability in a compact, affordable desktop package. Prints and contour cuts stickers, decals, heat transfers, and custom graphics.

name: Mimaki UJV100-160 Plus Wide Format UV Printer
description: High-quality entry-level roll-to-roll UV LED printer. Features instant ink curing, printing speeds up to 23m²/h, and three-layer printing for transparent or dark films.

name: Roland VersaSTUDIO BN2-30 Wide Format Print & Cut
description: Next-generation 30-inch desktop printer/cutter offering significantly faster print speeds, automated features, and print & cut capability for professional signmakers.

name: Mimaki CJV200-130 Wide Format Print & Cut
description: High-performance eco-solvent print & cut system with Epson printheads. Superb image quality, versatile printing capabilities, and highly accurate contour cutting.

name: Roland RC-300 Helical/Cylindrical UV Printer
description: Direct-to-object decoration for cylindrical and lightly tapered products. Print on bottles, containers, promotional items, and limited-edition packaging with instant UV curing.

name: Roland IO-300 Industrial UV Flatbed Printer
description: Industrial UV Flatbed with B2 (500x700mm) print area. Bridges the gap between desktop UV and bigger flatbeds. New laser height detection, prints up to 242mm without bed removal.

name: Roland AG-640 Large Format Resin Print & Cut
description: 64" resin print & cut with instant drying and high-gloss finish. Lower running costs than latex. Perfect for wraps, stickers, signage, wallpaper, banners, and canvas. Odourless operation.

name: Mimaki UJV200 UV Print Only Wide Format Printer
description: Wide format UV printer available in 54" or 64". Features ink saving mode (up to 50% reduced ink), high-density ink for solid fills, 6 colour ink configuration, and supports 3-layer printing.

name: Roland EU2-1000MF UV Flatbed Printer
description: High production UV flatbed with 1220x2440mm (8x4ft) bed size, 95mm max media height. Up to 43.5 m²/h — 1.5x faster than previous model. CMYK, White & Gloss options. Very low ink costs.

name: Mimaki UJ330H-160 UV Hybrid Printer
description: Hybrid UV inkjet printer handling both roll media and rigid boards up to 50.8mm thick. 2.5D textured prints, multi-layer effects, spot varnish, white ink circulation, and energy-efficient UV-LED curing.

name: Roland VG4 Series Wide Format Print & Cut (VG4-540/640)
description: Next-gen print & cut in 54" & 64". New generation printhead for faster output and higher image quality. Red, green, orange, and white inks. TR3 inks, 7" touchscreen, upgraded front media winder.

name: Roland DGXPRESS ER-641 64" Eco-Solvent Printer
description: 64" low-cost eco-solvent print-only machine. Up to 25.5 m²/h. Enlarged single print head, low-cost TH inks, easy-access maintenance components. VersaWorks RIP and DG Connect included.

name: Mimaki CJV200-160 Wide Format Print & Cut
description: Largest-format CJV200 model built for greater width, improved productivity and dependable print-and-cut performance. Handles larger signage and wider display graphics without compromising quality.

name: Mimaki CJV200-75 Compact Print & Cut
description: Compact professional print-and-cut wide format printer. Perfect for signmakers, print studios, and growing businesses. Ideal for stickers, decals, labels, posters, and window graphics in limited spaces.

name: Roland VG3-540 Wide Format Print & Cut
description: Professional 54" wide format print & cut. Part of Roland's TrueVIS generation with vivid colour output and precise contour cutting. Automatic calibrations, fast drying TR2 inks, 7" touchscreen.

name: Roland BD-12 A4 Desktop UV Flatbed Printer
description: Print on almost anything — slate, acrylic, card, wood, metal, plastics. Double the bed size of BD-8 (305x210mm). Built-in air filtration, EcoUV5 inks, smartphone tray with AR markers. Rotary option available.

name: Roland XG-640 High-Production Print & Cut
description: 64" high-production eco-solvent print & cut. Up to 76.1 sqm/h! Dual-staggered printheads, automatic calibrations, TR3 GBL-free inks. White, Orange, Green, and Red ink options. Lowest running costs in category.

name: Mimaki JV200 Series Print Only Wide Format Printer
description: Available in 54" or 64". NEW SS22 GBL-free ink or BS4 low cost solvent ink. Orange ink option. Ink saving mode (up to 43% reduced ink). Nozzle Check Units, Recovery System, and MAPS technology.

name: Roland LO Series UV Flatbed Printers
description: UV Flatbed available in 762mm or 1625mm width with 242mm max media thickness. Updated print engine for higher productivity. Laser pointer for origin setting, anti-static bar, touchscreen control, red and orange ink options.

name: Roland MO-180 A3 UV Desktop Flatbed Printer
description: High-performance desktop UV solution for rigid substrates. Uses UV-LED curing for instant dry prints. Supports white ink and gloss ink for layered textures and spot varnish finishes. Perfect for merchandise and awards.

name: Roland TrueVIS XP-640 High-Production Printer
description: 64" high-production eco-solvent print only. Up to 76.1 sqm/h! Dual-staggered printheads, automatic calibrations, TH2 inks. Orange, Green, and Red ink options. 7" LED touchscreen, media winder included.

name: Mimaki UCJV330-160 UV Wide Format Print & Cut
description: High production 64" UV print & cut. Instant UV curing, white and gloss ink options, automatic calibrations, 1L inks, ink saving function. 4 & 5 layer printing modes for double-sided graphics.

name: Roland VersaOBJECT CO-i Series UV Flatbed Printers
description: Industrial UV flatbed in multiple sizes (762mm-1625mm width, up to 3m length). 242mm max height. Touchscreen control, red and orange ink options, spot gloss and white flood coat. Fits where other industrial UV machines can't.

name: Roland BD-8 A5 Desktop UV Flatbed Printer
description: Customise almost anything up to A5 — slate, acrylic, card, wood, metal, plastics. Bed size 148x210mm, 102mm max height. Built-in air filtration, EcoUV5 inks meeting EN71-3 toy safety standards. Rotary option.

name: Roland AP-640 Resin Print Only (Instant Drying)
description: Roland's greener printing solution. 64" resin print only with instant curing, odourless operation, high scratch resistance. Up to 24.2m²/hr. 700cc inks, long-life print heads. Lower running costs than latex.

name: Mimaki JV330-160 High Production Print Only
description: 64" high-production print only with bulk 2L ink system. XY slitter, 3-roll media changer, V-shape cut function. Automatic pinch rollers, orange ink option, NCU, NRS, MAPS and UISS technology.

name: Mimaki UCJV300 Series UV Print & Cut
description: UV print & cut available in 32", 44", 54" or 64". Instant cure UV ink, 4 & 5 layer printing modes for double-sided graphics. White & clear (gloss) ink, NCU, NRS, MAPS, and UISS technology.

name: Mimaki CJV330-160 High Production Print & Cut
description: 64" high-production print & cut with bulk 2L ink system. XY slitter, 3-roll media changer, V-shape cut function, ID cut function, automatic pinch rollers. 6 ink configuration options.

name: Roland MO-240 A2 UV Desktop Flatbed Printer
description: A2 UV flatbed for promotional products, trophies, signage, and industrial applications. 610×458mm bed size, 204mm max height. Touchscreen controls, automatic calibrations, high opacity white ink, spot gloss option.

name: Roland BN-20A Desktop Print & Cut
description: Compact desktop print & cut. 1440 DPI, loadable media width 150-515mm, printable/cutting width up to 480mm. White or metallic ink options. Perfect for stickers, labels, t-shirts, and small signage.

name: Roland TrueVIS MG Series UV Print & Cut (MG-300/MG-640)
description: Entry to mid-level UV print & cut in 30" or 64". Instant curing, white and gloss options, red and orange inks. UV DTF with Decal ink option. High scratch resistance, low running cost, compact design.

name: Roland TrueVIS LG Series UV Printer (LG-300/540/640)
description: Mid to high production UV print & cut in 30", 54" or 64". Up to 35m²/hr. Instant curing, automatic calibrations, white and gloss options, red and orange inks. 750cc inks, low running costs.

name: Roland TrueVIS SG3-540 Print & Cut
description: Print & cut available in 30" or 54". Fast drying TR2 inks, automatic calibrations, 7" LED touchscreen control panel. Media winder and DG Connect software included. Perfect for stickers, banners, and signage.

name: Roland VG3-640 Wide Format Print & Cut
description: Professional 64" wide format print & cut from Roland's flagship TrueVIS range. Outstanding colour accuracy, dependable print-and-cut capability. Ideal for signage, stickers, retail graphics, and vehicle wraps.

name: Mimaki CJV200 Series Wide Format Print & Cut
description: Available in 32", 54" or 64". NEW SS22 GBL-free ink or BS4 low cost solvent ink. Orange ink option, ink saving mode (up to 43% reduced ink). NCU, NRS, MAPS, UISS, and Waveform Control Technology.

name: NUtec A20-HYB Ink
description: Amethyst A20-HYB is a general purpose, hybrid UV ink designed for rigid and roll-to-roll applications on Ricoh® Gen 5, Gen 5s, & Gen 6, as well as the Kyocera® KJ4A print heads.

name: NUtec A20-RIG Ink
description: Amethyst A20-RIG is a GREENGUARD Gold certified, premium quality UV ink developed for Ricoh® Gen 5 & Gen 5s, as well as the Kyocera® KJ4A print heads.

name: NUtec A20-RTR Ink
description: Amethyst A20-RTR is a GREENGUARD Gold certified premium quality, roll-to-roll UV ink, designed for Ricoh® Gen 5, Gen 5s & Gen 6, as well as the Kyocera® KJ4A print heads.

name: NUtec A20-RTR-MI Ink
description: Amethyst A20-RTR-MI is a GREENGUARD Gold certified, premium quality roll-to-roll UV-curable ink, designed for Mimaki® Roll-to-Roll printers.

name: NUtec A50-HYB Ink
description: Amethyst A50-HYB is a premium quality hybrid UV-curable ink, designed for a wide range of rigid and roll-to-roll applications. It is a wide format ink that cures with LED and Conventional UV lamps.

name: NUtec A50-RIG Ink
description: Amethyst A50-RIG is a GREENGUARD Gold certified premium quality rigid UV ink, with superior media adhesion qualities, for use without primer, on a large variety of rigid substrates.

name: NUtec A50-RTR Ink
description: Amethyst A50-RTR is a superior roll-to-roll UV curable ink suitable for LED and Conventional UV lamps. This fast curing ink performs well in a demanding, high speed printing environment, providing enhanced scuff and chemical resistance.

name: NUtec A50-RTR-EF Ink
description: Amethyst A50-RTR-EF is a superior roll-to-roll UV curable ink optimised for use on the EFI® VUTEk® Roll-to-Roll QS and GS series printers.

name: NUtec Q50-HYB Ink
description: Quartz Q50-HYB is a cost-effective hybrid UV-Curable ink optimised for LED UV lamp curing and developed for printers using Konica Minolta® KM1024i and Ricoh® Gen 5 & 6 printheads.

name: NUtec Q50-RTR2 Ink
description: Quartz Q50-RTR2 is a cost-effective, wide-format roll-to-roll UV-curable ink designed for a large number of self-adhesive and flexible media applications.

name: NUtec R10-DTF Ink
description: Ruby R10-DTF UV-curable direct-to-film ink for durable decals on hard goods with vivid colour, high-opacity white and clean carrier release without weeding.

name: NUtec R10-HYB Ink
description: Ruby R10-HYB is a hybrid UV ink, optimised for LED UV lamps and developed for Epson® DX7, I3200-U1 & XP600 printheads.

name: NUtec R10-RTR Ink
description: Ruby R10-RTR is a premium quality, roll-to-roll UV-curable ink optimised for LED UV-lamp curing and developed for Epson® DX7, I3200-U1 & XP600 printheads.

name: NUtec R20-HYB Ink
description: Ruby R20-HYB is a general purpose, fast curing hybrid UV ink, optimised for LED UV lamps and developed for Ricoh® and Kyocera® printheads.

name: NUtec R20-RTR Ink
description: Ruby R20-RTR is a fast curing roll-to-roll UV ink optimised for LED UV lamps on printers using Ricoh® Gen 5 and Kyocera® KJ4A printheads.

name: NUtec R50-RTR Ink
description: Ruby R50-RTR is a fast curing roll-to-roll UV curable ink optimised for LED UV lamps, developed for Fujifilm®, Konica Minolta®, Xaar®,  ToshibaTec®, Ricoh® and Seiko® printheads.

name: NUtec D10-ESM Ink
description: Diamond D10-ESM eco-solvent ink is designed as a back to back replacement for Roland® Eco-Sol Max™ inks, and provides excellent media compatibility across a broad range of self-adhesive and flexible substrates.

name: NUtec D10-ESM2 Ink
description: Diamond D10-ESM2 eco-solvent ink is designed as a back to back replacement for Roland® Eco-Sol MAX2™ inks, providing excellent media compatibility across a broad range of self-adhesive and flexible substrates.

name: NUtec D10-GF-CS25 Ink
description: Diamond D10-GF-CS25 is a GBL-free high-performance eco-solvent ink formulated as a seamless, plug-and-play alternative for Mimaki® CS250 inks.

name: NUtec D10-GF-MS21 Ink
description: Diamond D10-GF-MS21 eco-solvent ink is designed as a back to back replacement for Mimaki® SS21™ inks only. This formulation is GBL-free and offers superior abrasion and chemical resistance.

name: NUtec D15-TRV2 Ink
description: Diamond D15-TRV2 GBL-free eco-solvent ink is designed as a back to back replacement for Roland® TrueVIS® TR2 inks used in Roland® VG, VG2, SG and SG2 printers.

name: NUtec D20-GF Ink
description: Diamond D20-GF is a GBL-free, premium eco-solvent ink designed for use on the Fujifilm® Dimatix® Spectra Starfire print head.

name: NUtec T15-RG Ink
description: Topaz T15-RG is an optimised, premium quality, mild solvent ink, designed for use in Ricoh® Gen 5 print heads, as used in printers such as Mimaki® SWJ. This low-smell formulation renders great image quality with a high gloss finish and is ideal for backlit printing. This ink features excellent press stability, ensuring uninterrupted printing for extended periods, with low  maintenance requirements.

name: NUtec T35-SK-LS Ink
description: Topaz T35-SK-LS is a premium quality mild solvent ink, ideal for reliable and efficient high-speed printing. It is optimised for use in Seiko® SPT 35pl and performs well on a range of other print heads, including Spectra Polaris® and Konica Minolta®. This low-smell ink also offers excellent media compatibility across a broad range of self-adhesive and flexible substrates, with a high gloss finish.

name: NUtec AQ10-DSS Ink
description: Aquamarine AQ10-DSS is an ECO Passport certified high density dye sublimation ink available in CMYK, Fluorescent Pink (FP) and Fluorescent Yellow (FY), and designed for the Epson® DX4, DX5, DX6, DX7, I1600, I3200, and XP600 print heads.

name: NUtec AQ10-DST-HC Ink
description: Aquamarine AQ10-DST-HC is high density dye sublimation ink available in CMYK, Fluorescent Pink (FP) and Fluorescent Yellow (FY), and is designed for the Epson® DX4, DX5, DX6, DX7, 5113, I1600, I3200, PrecisionCore TFP, XP600 & EPS3200 print heads.
